title: particle emitters
description: provides blocks that can emit particles or sounds
body:
adds 2 blocks:
- particle emitter. creates particles.
- sound emitter. creates sounds.

each block has a gui to select which particle/sound to emit and is activated by a redstone signal.
the blocks themselves are untextured and don't have recipes so a pack author will need to supply them if they're wanted.

created by Leclowndu93150 for upcomming [untitled awesome modpack 3000](https://modrinth.com/modpack/untitled-awesome-modpack-3000)
